findings.description: ThinkingBlock component renders collapsible thinking blocks with Brain icon, 'Thinking...' label, duration display (Xs), and caret toggle (CaretRight/CaretDown). Supports defaultExpanded prop.
findings.evidence: ThinkingBlock.tsx: useState for isExpanded, Brain + Caret icons, durationMs display as seconds, collapsible content area with thinking-text testid

findings.description: Thinking text rendered in italic monospace style with max-height scroll and proper word wrapping
findings.evidence: ThinkingBlock.tsx line 40: 'text-sm text-muted-foreground italic whitespace-pre-wrap break-words max-h-96 overflow-y-auto'

findings.description: Thinking block events handled in stream event handlers
Cannot visually verify thinking blocks in active conversation due to conversation crash issue
